zh.lifeSummary: 當John de Byron於1253年出生在英國越可爾克雷頓時，他的父親John de Byron36歲，母親Joan de Thies27歲。他和Alice de Banastre至少有2個兒子和3個女兒。他去世於1339年在英國英格蘭享年86歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Byron
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Byram (Yorkshire), named with Old English bȳrum ‘at the cattle sheds’, dative plural of bȳre ‘byre’. This name has occasionally been adopted as a Jewish surname, presumably as an Americanized form of some similar (like-sounding) Jewish name.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When John de Byron was born in 1253, in Clayton, Yorkshire, England, his father, John de Byron, was 36 and his mother, Joan de Thies, was 27. He had at least 2 sons and 3 daughters with Alice de Banastre. He died in 1339, in England, United Kingdom, at the age of 86.

ja.lifeSummary: John de Byronが1253年にイギリスヨークシュアイアクレイトンで生まれた時，父John de Byronは36歳，母Joan de Thiesは27歳であった。彼はAlice de Banastreとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼は1339年にイギリスイギリスで86歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John de Byron(이)가 1253년 영국 요르크실르 클레이턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John de Byron(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan de Thies(은)는 27세였다. 그는 Alice de Banastre(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1339년 영국 잉글랜드에서 86세의 나이로 사망했다.
